---
title: "bat_tab"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-04-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

library(ggplot2)

batdat <- read.csv("us_bat_temps.csv")
bat_new <- na.omit(batdat)
#View(batdat)

library(tidyverse)
bat_new = bat_new %>%
  drop_na(cluster_size)%>%
  drop_na(species)%>%
  drop_na(temp) %>%
  filter(species!="LANO")%>% #clean to remove these!!!
  filter(species!="MYAU" )%>%
  filter(species!="SUBSTRATE") %>%
  filter(species!="MYLE") 

g1 <- glm(temp ~ cluster_size * species, data = bat_new, family = gaussian, na.action = na.exclude)
summary(g1) 
library(knitr)

#k1 <- exp(confint.default(g1)[1:2,])
k2 <- exp(confint.default(g1)[c(1:2, 7:10),])
#kable(k1)
kable(k2)
```
